# OpenTrack

> An open, public-by-default issue tracker: workspaces → projects → boards, customizable
> kanban, tickets, public feedback (suggestions & bug reports), releases/changelog, and
> bidirectional GitHub sync. Self-hosted. This instance exposes a scoped REST API and an MCP
> server for programmatic and agent access.

All paths below are relative to this instance's origin (the site you fetched this file from).
Public read pages need no auth; the API and MCP require an API key.

## Authentication

- Create an API key under a workspace's **Settings → API keys** (or, as an admin, under
  **Admin → API tokens**). Keys are scoped to one workspace.
- Scopes: `read` (list/read + search) and `write` (create/update tickets, add comments).
- Send it as a header: `Authorization: Bearer <key>`. The REST API also accepts `?api_key=<key>`.
- Rate limits: REST ~120 req/min per workspace; MCP ~240 req/min per workspace.

## MCP server (for AI agents)

- Endpoint: [`/api/mcp`](/api/mcp) — JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP POST (Streamable HTTP transport;
  no SSE stream). Send `Authorization: Bearer <key>`. Must be enabled by an admin
  (Admin → Integrations); returns 404 if disabled.
- Read tools (need `read`): `list_projects`, `list_tickets` (filter by open/closed/all),
  `get_ticket` (by project slug + number), `search_tickets`.
- Write tools (need `write`): `create_ticket`, `update_ticket`, `add_comment`.
- Standard MCP handshake: `initialize`, then `tools/list` to discover exact input schemas,
  then `tools/call`.

## REST API (v1)

Read endpoints, `read` scope, JSON responses. `{projectId}` is the project's id.

- [`GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/tickets`](/api/v1) — tickets (number, title, priority, open/closed status, column, timestamps).
- `GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/suggestions` — feedback items (title, status, votes, comments).
- `GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/releases` — published releases.

## Public (no auth)

- `/{workspace}/{project}` — public project board.
- `/{workspace}/{project}/suggestions` — public feedback (suggestions & bugs); submit, upvote, comment.
- `/{workspace}/{project}/suggestions/rss.xml` — feedback RSS feed.
- `/{workspace}/{project}/roadmap` and `/releases` — public roadmap & changelog.
- `/embed/{workspace}/{project}/{roadmap|changelog|feedback|known-issues}` — embeddable widgets (iframe); `roadmap.svg`, `changelog.svg`, `badge.svg` for READMEs. Availability is per-project (owner-configured).

## Docs

- Self-hosting guide: `docs/self-hosting.md` in the source repository.
- README: `README.md` in the source repository.
